headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Norwegian Cruise Line, Lowers Price Target to $21
summary: Barclays  analyst Brandt Montour   maintains Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $22 to $21.
